data.title: Lilly Employer Connect platform launches with over fifteen independent program administrators offering tailored obesity coverage options to expand access to patients
data.description: Lilly is offering Zepbound® (tirzepatide) KwikPen® for individual use at a fixed price of $449 per dose through their Lilly Employer Connect platform. This pricing is consistent for all available doses of the medication. Employees can also benefit from reduced cost-sharing options. These flexible benefit designs aim to increase access to treatments for obesity while also being in line with other initiatives related to the same cause.

data.title: Pivot Energy and Sustain Our Future Foundation Partner to Invest $400,000 in Communities in Garrett County, MD, Kicking Off Multi-Year Commitment
data.description: Denver-based Pivot Energy has recently revealed a new partnership with the Sustain Our Future Foundation (SOFF) to finance solar projects in the U.S. supported by Microsoft. This collaboration is linked to approximately 500 MWac of solar projects across the country. The agreement is part of a multi-year initiative to invest in renewable energy and benefit local communities.

data.title: Mile Marker Celebrates One Year Launch Anniversary Capped by Impressive Growth, and the Unveiling of New NYC HQ
data.description: In just one year, the independent media agency transitioned from a concept to a proven growth engine, achieving an impressive 40% increase in revenue. This growth was fueled by securing significant AOR contracts with various clients, earning recognition within the industry for its work. Additionally, the agency expanded its presence by establishing a new collaborative hub in Manhattan. The developments took place in New York on March 5, 2026.

data.title: B/CORE Acquires Fuel Consulting to Deepen Mission Reach Across the Intelligence Community
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Reston, Virginia, B/CORE, a national security technology company specializing in converting emerging technology for use by the Intelligence Community (IC) and Department of War (DoW), revealed the acquisition of Fuel Consulting, LLC. The deal marks a significant move for B/CORE as it continues to strengthen its position in the industry.

data.title: Inventory Recovery is Plateauing: Realtor.com® February Monthly Housing Report
data.description: In February, the housing market in Austin, Texas saw a significant shift as the time on market increased by 4 days, totaling nearly two years of declining sales pace. The median list price also decreased by 2.0% year-over-year. This ongoing trend contributed to a 28th consecutive month of inventory growth, indicating a balancing market.

data.title: Hyperscale Data's Subsidiary askROI Deploys Claude Opus 4.6 to Power Next-Generation Artificial Intelligence Reasoning, Agents and Enterprise Intelligence
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Hyperscale Data, Inc. revealed through PRNewswire that its subsidiary askROI, Inc., which is controlled by Hyperscale Data and operates in the artificial intelligence ("AI") sector, has taken a significant step. Hyperscale Data, listed as GPUS on the NYSE American stock exchange, shared this development.

data.title: 160+ Course Sales and 100K New Visitors Generated Through Productside Website Redesign by Digital Silk
data.description: In Miami on March 5, 2026, Digital Silk, a renowned agency specializing in brand strategies and digital marketing, collaborated with Productside for a website redesign. The partnership led to a significant increase in traffic and course enrollment. The agency focuses on custom websites and successful digital marketing campaigns. The collaboration has proven successful, manifesting in measurable growth for both parties involved.

data.title: Genesis Energy, L.P. Announces Early Results and Initial Settlement Date for Tender Offer for Any and All of Its 7.750% Senior Notes Due 2028
data.description: In Houston, Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) revealed the receipt of tenders for $415,942,000 worth of their 7.750% senior notes due 2028. These notes were co-issued with Genesis Energy Finance Corporation. This is part of a cash tender offer to acquire any remaining principal amount of the Notes. The Tender Offer closed at 5:00 p.m., New York City time.
